title: Review hospital add and remove state before and after recovery
purpose: Capture a reusable symptom and recovery validation pattern for hospital station add/remove asymmetry without asserting root cause.

action_tuple.validation_goal: confirm pre-recovery add/remove asymmetry and post-recovery restoration

operational_intent: Capture a reusable symptom and recovery validation pattern for hospital station add/remove asymmetry without asserting root cause.
preconditions: Incident evidence indicates hospital tote handling problems.
At least one source artifact or chat record is available for review.

steps.instruction: Record whether hospital remove works while add fails, using only source-backed evidence.
steps.validation_check: confirm pre-recovery add/remove asymmetry and post-recovery restoration

steps.instruction: Record any source-backed indication that the station or related robot was not in normal operating state.
steps.validation_check: confirm pre-recovery add/remove asymmetry and post-recovery restoration

steps.instruction: Record the first source-backed confirmation that both add and remove functions were restored.
steps.validation_check: confirm pre-recovery add/remove asymmetry and post-recovery restoration

do_not_do: Do not treat suspected AGV/tote mismatch as validated root cause.
Do not convert recovery notes into a restart procedure.
validation_checks: confirm pre-recovery add/remove asymmetry and post-recovery restoration
escalation_conditions: Hospital symptom pattern cannot be confirmed from evidence.
Post-recovery evidence does not confirm both add and remove functions.

title: Review AGV placement and tote association anomaly evidence
purpose: Document AGV and tote-state anomalies associated with blocked flow while keeping cause statements candidate-only.

action_tuple.validation_goal: identify source-backed AGV placement and disconnected tote anomalies

operational_intent: Document AGV and tote-state anomalies associated with blocked flow while keeping cause statements candidate-only.
preconditions: Evidence references specific AGV IDs or tote IDs.
Robot detail or summary artifacts are available.

steps.instruction: List each AGV and tote identifier explicitly named in the evidence.
steps.validation_check: identify source-backed AGV placement and disconnected tote anomalies

steps.instruction: Capture source-backed observations of wrong-zone, under-rack, pickup-location, or disconnected-tote conditions.
steps.validation_check: identify source-backed AGV placement and disconnected tote anomalies

steps.instruction: Preserve any visible robot detail fields only when clearly readable.
steps.validation_check: identify source-backed AGV placement and disconnected tote anomalies

do_not_do: Do not upgrade anomaly observations to validated root cause.
Do not infer hidden robot fields from noisy screenshots.
validation_checks: identify source-backed AGV placement and disconnected tote anomalies
escalation_conditions: Multiple conflicting AGV/tote anomaly descriptions appear in evidence.

title: Review endpoint-based tote recovery actions and authorization gaps
purpose: Preserve evidence of endpoint-based tote actions used during recovery while clearly marking missing approval and process details.

action_tuple.validation_goal: confirm what endpoint-based tote actions were used and what authorization gaps remain

operational_intent: Preserve evidence of endpoint-based tote actions used during recovery while clearly marking missing approval and process details.
preconditions: Normal-path tote action failure is documented.

steps.instruction: Record the tote action that failed through the normal interface.
steps.validation_check: confirm what endpoint-based tote actions were used and what authorization gaps remain

steps.instruction: Record the endpoint-based tote action that was used during recovery.
steps.validation_check: confirm what endpoint-based tote actions were used and what authorization gaps remain

steps.instruction: Record any source-backed note that process documentation, training, or authorization review was requested.
steps.validation_check: confirm what endpoint-based tote actions were used and what authorization gaps remain

do_not_do: Do not convert this review artifact into an approved operational procedure.
Do not assume endpoint use is authorized for all roles.
validation_checks: confirm what endpoint-based tote actions were used and what authorization gaps remain
escalation_conditions: Endpoint-based action is mentioned without enough context to identify what changed.
Authorization or process ownership is unclear.

title: Validate recovery after documented service restart and asset re-add
purpose: Create a reusable post-recovery validation pattern for incidents where restart and re-add actions are documented but execution details remain incomplete.

action_tuple.validation_goal: confirm restored movement and restored affected function after documented recovery actions

operational_intent: Create a reusable post-recovery validation pattern for incidents where restart and re-add actions are documented but execution details remain incomplete.
preconditions: A restart or equivalent recovery action is already documented.
Post-action site or support updates are available.

steps.instruction: Capture the first source-backed indication that movement or production resumed.
steps.validation_check: confirm restored movement and restored affected function after documented recovery actions

steps.instruction: Capture the first source-backed indication that the originally failed operational function was restored.
steps.validation_check: confirm restored movement and restored affected function after documented recovery actions

steps.instruction: Record any remaining follow-up risks separately from the main recovery confirmation.
steps.validation_check: confirm restored movement and restored affected function after documented recovery actions

do_not_do: Do not treat restart completion alone as recovery validation.
Do not mark root cause as validated based only on restored operation.
validation_checks: confirm restored movement and restored affected function after documented recovery actions
escalation_conditions: Movement resumes but the originally failed function remains impaired.
Recovery is reported without any source-backed operational confirmation.

title: Review service restart path and response validation evidence
purpose: Capture a reusable review pattern for incidents where service-layer restart and response checks were used to restore application responsiveness.

action_tuple.validation_goal: confirm documented restart target and post-restart response evidence

operational_intent: Capture a reusable review pattern for incidents where service-layer restart and response checks were used to restore application responsiveness.
preconditions: Evidence explicitly documents a service restart target.
A post-restart validation or recovery note exists.

steps.instruction: Record the exact restart target named in the evidence.
steps.validation_check: confirm documented restart target and post-restart response evidence

steps.instruction: Record any required coordination state such as E-stop, site hold, or engineer-only access.
steps.validation_check: confirm documented restart target and post-restart response evidence

steps.instruction: Record the first post-restart evidence showing service response, movement restoration, or site recovery.
steps.validation_check: confirm documented restart target and post-restart response evidence

do_not_do: Do not merge this into a single executable restart procedure without SME review of target-specific differences.
Do not assume Ignition restart, Optisweep service restart, and combined restart paths are equivalent.
validation_checks: confirm documented restart target and post-restart response evidence
escalation_conditions: Restart target is ambiguous across artifacts.
Recovery is reported without a clear post-restart validation signal.

title: Review tipper heartbeat timeout and no-fault signature
purpose: Capture the recurring symptom signature where flow stops near tippers while local fault views remain clear or inconclusive.

action_tuple.validation_goal: confirm heartbeat abnormality and no-fault presentation from source evidence

operational_intent: Capture the recurring symptom signature where flow stops near tippers while local fault views remain clear or inconclusive.
preconditions: Incident evidence indicates stalled flow to tippers or startup waiting state.
Heartbeat or local-state evidence is available.

steps.instruction: Record the source-backed flow symptom near the tippers.
steps.validation_check: confirm heartbeat abnormality and no-fault presentation from source evidence

steps.instruction: Record any heartbeat timeout, zero, failed, or stale indication visible in evidence.
steps.validation_check: confirm heartbeat abnormality and no-fault presentation from source evidence

steps.instruction: Record whether RMS, HMI, or local alarm views showed no clear fault at the same time.
steps.validation_check: confirm heartbeat abnormality and no-fault presentation from source evidence

do_not_do: Do not infer OT-side root cause from heartbeat symptoms alone.
Do not assume all recurrence cases have identical heartbeat evidence quality.
validation_checks: confirm heartbeat abnormality and no-fault presentation from source evidence
escalation_conditions: Heartbeat condition cannot be confirmed from available evidence.
Visible hardware alarms suggest a different failure mode.

title: Collect service timeout and communications evidence for review
purpose: Preserve a bounded evidence-collection pattern for timeout, disconnect, and communications-instability investigations without asserting causality.

action_tuple.validation_goal: capture raw timeout and communications evidence for manual review

operational_intent: Preserve a bounded evidence-collection pattern for timeout, disconnect, and communications-instability investigations without asserting causality.
preconditions: Logs, screenshots, or event views are available.
Incident has unresolved timeout, disconnect, or recurrence questions.

steps.instruction: Capture raw event or log evidence with timestamps and source system names.
steps.validation_check: capture raw timeout and communications evidence for manual review

steps.instruction: Capture any visible timeout, connection reset, keep-alive, or communications error strings exactly as shown.
steps.validation_check: capture raw timeout and communications evidence for manual review

steps.instruction: Record evidence gaps explicitly when requested logs or views were not available.
steps.validation_check: capture raw timeout and communications evidence for manual review

do_not_do: Do not label timeout evidence as initiating root cause unless explicitly validated.
Do not paraphrase raw error text when exact wording is visible.
validation_checks: capture raw timeout and communications evidence for manual review
escalation_conditions: Evidence suggests recurring communications instability beyond support review scope.

title: Establish customer bridge and site coordination for incident handling
purpose: Preserve a reusable coordination pattern for incidents where missing bridge participation or unclear site state delays technical recovery.

action_tuple.validation_goal: confirm active bridge participation and current site operating state

operational_intent: Preserve a reusable coordination pattern for incidents where missing bridge participation or unclear site state delays technical recovery.
preconditions: Incident is active and customer/site coordination affects recovery timing.

steps.instruction: Confirm whether a customer-facing bridge or callback path is active.
steps.validation_check: confirm active bridge participation and current site operating state

steps.instruction: Confirm who is actively investigating and who is onsite.
steps.validation_check: confirm active bridge participation and current site operating state

steps.instruction: Record current site state such as manual operation, E-stop, or waiting-for-update condition.
steps.validation_check: confirm active bridge participation and current site operating state

do_not_do: Do not treat internal-only chat as equivalent to a customer bridge.
Do not proceed as though site state is known when evidence shows it is unclear.
validation_checks: confirm active bridge participation and current site operating state
escalation_conditions: No onsite contact joins or confirms status.
Customer is waiting for callback with no active owner visible.
